prompt: Create a polished anime-style illustration of two young adult cat-eared women sparring playfully inside a traditional Japanese dojo with tatami mats. The left character is a short brown-haired catgirl with brown cat ears, barefoot, wearing a dark athletic romper with black shorts and a cropped navy jacket with white sleeve cuffs; she stands in a wide martial-arts stance with one palm raised defensively and the other hand near her chest. The right character is a short black-haired catgirl with black cat ears, barefoot, wearing a beige blazer over a black sleeveless top and high-waisted black shorts; she lunges forward with one fist extended as if striking and the other fist held back. Place exactly two main characters in the scene, both full-body, dynamic, energetic, and facing each other. Between them, create a magical effect made of exactly two large iridescent soap-bubble swirls near their hips plus a looping translucent ribbon of bubbles around their hands, with many small floating bubbles catching rainbow highlights. The dojo should have warm wooden beams, sliding panels, a mirrored wall on the right reflecting gym equipment, shelves with blue training pads or weights, framed pictures on the wall, and a large window on the left showing a bright snowy mountain landscape. Use soft afternoon sunlight streaming through the window, long shadows across the tatami, cinematic composition, clean linework, detailed anime rendering, glossy bubble reflections, soft depth of field, and a calm yet action-filled atmosphere. Keep the characters' faces softly obscured or blurred, with no readable text and no watermark.
